entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (P00138) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00138 TO EDFSA09D0012 IS TO INCORPORATE SLA'S RELATED TO DEBT RELIEF DISCHARGES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.
ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:ultimateParentUEIName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (P00139) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY THE PRICING STRUCTURE IN SECTION B OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT, PREVIOUSLY REVISED PER MODIFICATION (P00064), TO INCLUDE PRICING FOR THE FOLLOWING CHANGE REQUEST 6385.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (P00141) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.204-27 PROHIBITION ON A BYTEDANCE COVERED APPLICATION INTO THE CONTRACT WHICH ALSO EFFECTS ALL ASSOCIATED TASK ORDERS.
